news_title: Zeta Network Group Enters Strategic Partnership with SOLV Foundation to Advance Bitcoin-Centric Finance
summary: Zeta Network Group (Nasdaq: ZNB)announced a Strategic Partnership Agreement with SOLV Foundation onOctober 7, 2025to advance Bitcoin-centric finance. The company will deposit Bitcoin holdings on SOLV's platform, which has$2.5 billion TVL, using a regulated third-party custodian approved by ZNB to ensure transparency and auditability. A joint steering committee will promote SolvBTC adoption acrossSolana, Base and Tonand pursue tokenized real-world assets, structured yield products, and joint research while adhering to SEC and Nasdaq requirements.
